metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Authentication ASIM filtering parser for Google Workspace Logins
properties.query:
let GoogleWorkspaceLoginParser = (
    disabled: bool = false,
    pack: bool = false
)
{
    GoogleWorkspaceReports
    | where not(disabled)
    | where IdApplicationName == "login"
    | where EventType in ("login", "logout")
    | where EventName in (
        "login_success",
        "login_failure",
        "logout",
        "risky_sensitive_action_allowed",
        "risky_sensitive_action_blocked",
        "suspicious_login",
        "suspicious_login_less_secure_app",
        "suspicious_programmatic_login",
        "user_signed_out_due_to_suspicious_session_cookie"
        )
    | extend
        EventParametersJson = parse_json(EventParameters)
    | extend
        EventVendor = "Google",
        Dvc = "Google Workspace",
        LoginType = tostring(EventParametersJson.login_type),
        SensitiveActionName = tostring(EventParametersJson.sensitive_action_name),
        Challenges = iff(
            isempty(tostring(EventParametersJson.login_challenge_method)),
            dynamic(["none"]),
            EventParametersJson.login_challenge_method
        ),
        EventUid = _ItemId,
        EventProduct = "Google Workspace",
        EventSchema = "Authentication",
        EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.4",
        EventCount = int(1),
        EventStartTime = TimeGenerated,
        EventEndTime = TimeGenerated,
        EventType = case(
            EventName in ("logout", "user_signed_out_due_to_suspicious_session_cookie"), "Logoff",
            "Logon"
        ),
        EventResult = case(
            EventName in ("login_success", "risky_sensitive_action_allowed", "logout", "user_signed_out_due_to_suspicious_session_cookie"), "Success",
            EventName in ("login_failure", "risky_sensitive_action_blocked", "suspicious_login", "suspicious_login_less_secure_app", "suspicious_programmatic_login"), "Failure",
            ""
        ),
        EventResultDetails = case(
            EventName in ("suspicious_login_less_secure_app", "suspicious_programmatic_login", "risky_sensitive_action_blocked"), "Logon violates policy",
            "Other"
        ),
        TargetUsernameType = "UPN",
        TargetUserIdType = "Other",
        Src = SrcIpAddr,
        IpAddr = SrcIpAddr
    | extend EventMessage = case(
        EventName == "login_failure",
            strcat(ActorEmail, " failed to login."),
        EventName == "login_success",
            strcat(ActorEmail, " logged in."),
        EventName == "risky_sensitive_action_allowed",
            strcat(ActorEmail, " was allowed to attempt sensitive action: ", SensitiveActionName, ". This action might be restricted based on privileges or other limitations."),
        EventName == "risky_sensitive_action_blocked",
            strcat(ActorEmail, " wasn't allowed to attempt sensitive action: ", SensitiveActionName, "."),
        EventName == "logout",
            strcat(ActorEmail, " logged out."),
        EventName == "suspicious_login",
            strcat("Google has detected a suspicious login for ", ActorEmail),
        EventName == "suspicious_login_less_secure_app",
            strcat("Google has detected a suspicious login for ", ActorEmail , " from a less secure app."),
        EventName == "suspicious_programmatic_login",
            strcat("Google has detected a suspicious programmatic login for ", ActorEmail),
        EventName == "user_signed_out_due_to_suspicious_session_cookie",
            strcat("Suspicious session cookie detected for user ", ActorEmail),
        ""
    )
    | extend HasMFA = Challenges has_any (
        "security_key", "security_key_otp", "passkey", "userless_fido",
        "google_authenticator", "google_prompt", "device_prompt",
        "idv_preregistered_phone", "idv_any_phone", "backup_code",
        "offline_otp", "internal_two_factor", "cross_device", "web_approval"
        )
    | extend LogonMethod = case(
        HasMFA, "Multi factor authentication",
        LoginType == "google_password", "Username & Password",
        "Other"
        ),
        LogonProtocol = case(
            LoginType == "saml", "SAML",
            Challenges has_any ("saml"), "SAML",
            Challenges has_any ("oidc"), "OpenID Connect",
            "Other"
        )
    | project-rename
        EventOriginalUid = IdUniqueQualifier,
        TargetUserId = ActorProfileId,
        TargetUsername = ActorEmail,
        SrcGeoCountry = NetworkInfoRegionCode,
        SrcGeoRegion = NetworkInfoSubdivisionCode
    | extend AdditionalFields = iff(
        pack == true,
        bag_pack(
            "LoginType", LoginType,
            "LoginChallengeMethods", Challenges,
            "SensitiveActionName", SensitiveActionName
        ),
        dynamic({})
    )
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        Type,
        EventMessage,
        EventStartTime,
        EventEndTime,
        EventType,
        EventResult,
        EventResultDetails,
        LogonProtocol,
        LogonMethod,
        EventUid,
        EventOriginalUid,
        EventProduct,
        EventVendor,
        EventSchema,
        EventSchemaVersion,
        EventCount,
        TargetUsername,
        TargetUsernameType,
        TargetUserId,
        TargetUserIdType,
        Dvc,
        Src,
        SrcIpAddr,
        IpAddr,
        SrcGeoCountry,
        SrcGeoRegion,
        AdditionalFields
};
GoogleWorkspaceLoginParser(
    disabled = disabled,
    pack = pack
)
